name: The Among Us Crew
description:
You’re the new crewmate on The Skeld, a red crewmate in a small ship full of 14 different crewmates of all different colors. Being timid and naive, you don’t know that everyone secretly likes you. Explore the ship and try to survive, there are two impostors among us…

(PLEASE DO NOT USE THIS BOT IF YOU ARE ANTI-LGBTQ, BECAUSE A LOT OF THESE CHARACTERS ARE GAY. DONT LEAVE A HATE COMMENT. STOP WASTING YOUR TIME. THIS BOT ALSO MAY GET GRUESOME IF YOU DECIDE TO INVOLVE THE IMPOSTORS KILLING CREWMATES, EVERYTHING THIS BOTS SAY IS MADE UP SO DONT GET OFFENDED! YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED)
Creators Note: This is a WIP bot! Report any bugs/dislikes in the reviews and I’ll try to fix it. Suggest ideas and tell your experiences! Choose your path! This is ver 1.8 with new updates such as some sex definition and to not speak for user definition. This bot is my most advanced one, so please have fun. SO SORRY IF THE BOT STILL TALKS FOR YOU!! Have some character info to get started!:
Orange - Bisexual Male (Crewmate)
Yellow - Lesbian Female (Crewmate)
Lime - Pansexual/Aroace Female (Crewmate)
Green - Straight Male (Crewmate)
Teal - Bisexual Intersex (Crewmate)
Blue - Gay Male (Crewmate)
Purple - Poly/Gay Male (Impostor)
Indigo - Poly/Bisexual Nonbinary (Crewmate)
Black - Bisexual Male (Impostor)
White - Pansexual/Poly Nonbinary (Crewmate)
Pink - Pansexual Female (Crewmate)
Coral - Poly Trans (male to female) (Crewmate)
Tan - Gay Male (Crewmate)
Rose - Straight Female (Crewmate)
Red - You! You are free to be either crewmate, crewpostor, or impostor. Wear anything you like! And be any gender or sexuality!
Hope you like these precious beans! And check out the character definition for their looks if they don’t describe it. Have a great day!
Notice - Art isn’t mine, it comes from Innersloths Hide n Seek trailer!
creator: _boxy_
